plan.title: Wire/port + flip scope:undo, scope:demote, scope:decompose, changelog:resolve, architecture:sor

narratives.Description: This story finishes the lower-volume Bucket-B entrypoints that live in their own Taskfiles: scope_undo and scope_demote (core/src/scope/main.ts exists, so wire), resolve_changelog_unreleased (core/src/platform exists, so wire), and the two that need a genuine TS port (scope_decompose and preflight_architecture_sor have no core module). It exclusively owns tasks/scope.yml, tasks/scope-undo.yml, tasks/changelog.yml, and tasks/architecture.yml. It is independently buildable but carries real porting work, so it is the heaviest non-keystone story.
narratives.ImplementationPlan: 1. Wire scope-undo, scope-demote, changelog-resolve-unreleased verbs delegating to existing core modules; flip tasks/scope-undo.yml, the scope_demote line in tasks/scope.yml, and tasks/changelog.yml. 2. Port scope_decompose and preflight_architecture_sor to new TS core modules (packages/core/src/scope/decompose.ts, packages/core/src/architecture/sor-preflight.ts) reproducing the Python behavior including historical edge cases, expose as verbs, and flip tasks/scope.yml (decompose line) and tasks/architecture.yml. 3. Add focused vitest unit tests for the two new ports and a CHANGELOG entry; verify the scope-lifecycle-parity harness stays CLEAN.
narratives.UserStory: As a deft maintainer, I want scope undo/demote/decompose, changelog resolution, and the architecture SoR preflight to run on TS, so that their Python scripts become unreferenced before the #1731 delete.

items.title: Given `task scope:undo`, `task scope:demote`, and `task scope:decompose`, when each runs, then it invokes a bin.js verb and not `uv run python`.

narrative.Acceptance: Given `task scope:undo`, `task scope:demote`, and `task scope:decompose`, when each runs, then it invokes a bin.js verb and not `uv run python`.

items.title: Given the newly ported scope-decompose and architecture-sor TS modules, when their vitest suites run, then they pass including non-happy-path fixtures mirrored from the Python tests.

narrative.Acceptance: Given the newly ported scope-decompose and architecture-sor TS modules, when their vitest suites run, then they pass including non-happy-path fixtures mirrored from the Python tests.

items.title: Given `task changelog:resolve-unreleased` and `task architecture:preflight-sor`, when each runs, then it invokes a bin.js verb; and `grep -rE 'uv .*run python' tasks/scope.yml tasks/scope-undo.yml tasks/changelog.yml tasks/architecture.yml` returns no matches.

narrative.Acceptance: Given `task changelog:resolve-unreleased` and `task architecture:preflight-sor`, when each runs, then it invokes a bin.js verb; and `grep -rE 'uv .*run python' tasks/scope.yml tasks/scope-undo.yml tasks/changelog.yml tasks/architecture.yml` returns no matches.

references.title: Issue #1854: feat(ts-migration): Wave 8.6 -- finish the partial Python->TS live flip (precondition for #1731 delete)
